title.en: MIXTURES OF FERTILISERS COVERED INDIVIDUALLY BY DIFFERENT SUBCLASSES OF CLASS C05; MIXTURES OF ONE OR MORE FERTILISERS WITH MATERIALS NOT HAVING A SPECIFIC FERTILISING ACTIVITY, e.g. PESTICIDES, SOIL-CONDITIONERS, WETTING AGENTS (organic fertilisers containing added bacterial cultures, mycelia, or the like C05F11/08; organic fertilisers containing plant vitamins or hormones C05F11/10); FERTILISERS CHARACTERISED BY THEIR FORM
Mixtures of fertilisers belonging individually to different subclasses of C05
Mixtures of one or more fertilisers with additives not having a specially fertilising activity
for preventing the fertilisers being reduced to powder; Anti-dusting additives
for affecting fertiliser dosage or release rate; for affecting solubility
Biocides or preservatives, e.g. disinfectants, pesticides or herbicides; Pest repellants or attractants
for affecting wettability, e.g. drying agents
for affecting the nitrification of ammonium compounds or urea in the soil
Solid or semi-solid fertilisers, e.g. powders (layered or coated C05G5/30, incorporated into a matrix C05G5/40)
Liquid fertilisers (layered or coated C05G5/30; incorporated into a matrix C05G5/40)
Layered or coated, e.g. dust-preventing coatings
{Form not covered by groups C05G5/10 - C05G5/18, C05G5/20 - C05G5/27, C05G5/30 - C05G5/38 or C05G5/40, e.g. soluble or permeable packaging}
